## Summary

Describe the change in 1–3 sentences. What and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] feat: new feature
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] docs: documentation only
- [ ] chore: tooling/infra/maintenance
- [ ] refactor: code change without behavior impact
- [ ] test: add or improve tests
- [ ] ci: CI/CD or workflow changes

## How to test

Steps, commands, or notes to verify the change locally.

```bash
npm ci
npm run lint
npm run format:check
npm test
```

## Checklist

- [ ] I read and followed CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Ran `npm run format:check` and `npm run lint` locally
- [ ] Updated docs/README where relevant
- [ ] Added/updated tests if logic changed
- [ ] CI is green (or explained failures)
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits (`feat: ...`, `fix: ...`, etc.)

## Linked issues

Closes #<issue-number>
